mapper.select: select t.partner_member_id as partnerMemberId, m.name as partnerName, m.nickname as partnerNickname, m.profile_image_url as partnerProfileImageUrl, t.last_message as lastMessage, t.last_message_at as lastMessageAt, t.unread_count as unreadCount from ( select case when sender_id = #{memberId} then receiver_id else sender_id end as partner_member_id, date_format(max(created_at), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') as last_message_at, sum(case when receiver_id = #{memberId} and is_read = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as unread_count, substring_index( group_concat(content order by created_at desc, chat_id desc separator '|||'), '|||', 1 ) as last_message from chat_tbl where (sender_id = #{memberId} or receiver_id = #{memberId}) and deleted_yn = 0 and ( (sender_id = #{memberId} and (sender_hidden_at is null or created_at > sender_hidden_at)) or (receiver_id = #{memberId} and (receiver_hidden_at is null or created_at > receiver_hidden_at)) ) group by case when sender_id = #{memberId} then receiver_id else sender_id end ) t join members m on m.member_id = t.partner_member_id order by case when t.unread_count > 0 then 0 else 1 end, t.last_message_at desc, t.partner_member_id desc

select chat_id as chatId, sender_id as senderId, receiver_id as receiverId, content, is_read as isRead, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') as createdAt, deleted_yn as deletedYn from chat_tbl where deleted_yn = 0 and ( (sender_id = #{memberId} and receiver_id = #{partnerId}) or (sender_id = #{partnerId} and receiver_id = #{memberId}) ) and ( (sender_id = #{memberId} and (sender_hidden_at is null or created_at > sender_hidden_at)) or (receiver_id = #{memberId} and (receiver_hidden_at is null or created_at > receiver_hidden_at)) ) order by created_at asc, chat_id asc

select chat_id as chatId, sender_id as senderId, receiver_id as receiverId, content, is_read as isRead, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') as createdAt, deleted_yn as deletedYn, sender_deleted_yn as senderDeletedYn, receiver_deleted_yn as receiverDeletedYn from chat_tbl where chat_id = #{chatId} limit 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_tbl ( sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read, created_at, deleted_yn, sender_deleted_yn, receiver_deleted_yn, sender_hidden_at, receiver_hidden_at ) VALUES ( #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{isRead}, 0), #{createdAt}, COALESCE(#{deletedYn}, 0), COALESCE(#{senderDeletedYn}, 0), COALESCE(#{receiverDeletedYn}, 0), #{senderHiddenAt}, #{receiverHiddenAt} )
mapper.update: update chat_tbl set deleted_yn = 1, sender_deleted_yn = 1, receiver_deleted_yn = 1 where chat_id = #{chatId}
update chat_tbl set sender_deleted_yn = 1, deleted_yn = case when receiver_deleted_yn = 1 then 1 else deleted_yn end where chat_id = #{chatId} and sender_id = #{memberId} and deleted_yn = 0
update chat_tbl set receiver_deleted_yn = 1, deleted_yn = case when sender_deleted_yn = 1 then 1 else deleted_yn end where chat_id = #{chatId} and receiver_id = #{memberId} and deleted_yn = 0
